svg.title: ph-macro-lakehouse system architecture
svg.desc: Seven-layer data pipeline: PSA API and BSP HTML ingest to Bronze Parquet via SHA-256 dedup, PySpark transforms to Silver, quality engine writes Gold or quarantine, FastAPI serves Gold to React dashboard. PostgreSQL and Prefect form the control plane inside Docker Compose.

g.text: reads Gold from S3 · PyArrow · serves JSON
